name: paralegals at boutique law firms processing 5–15 cases/month tool
description: For paralegals at boutique law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, inefficient legal research causes delayed case preparations. We provide summarized case law and regulatory changes instead of manual case law research and regulatory updates.
target_audience: paralegals at boutique law firms processing 5–15 cases/month
problem_solved: Inefficient legal research processes lead to delayed case preparations.
